system.effect: The psyker floods the target's senses with false input, causing vivid hallucinations. The target must roll on the Hallucinogenic Effects table and suffers the result for the duration of the power.

description.value: The psyker projects terrifying or disorienting visions directly into the target's mind, overwhelming their senses with things that are not there. The target must roll on the Hallucinogenic Effects table and suffers the indicated result for the duration of the power. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the psyker may affect one additional target within range.
